esqlQuery.esql:
FROM metrics-cockroachdb.otel-default*
| WHERE service.name == "cockroachdb"
  AND ranges_underreplicated IS NOT NULL
  AND ranges_underreplicated > 0
// Store-level metric
| WHERE attributes.node_id IS NOT NULL AND attributes.store IS NOT NULL
| STATS underreplicated = MAX(ranges_underreplicated) BY attributes.node_id, attributes.store, host.name
| SORT underreplicated DESC
